---
title: "RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime"
---

## Overview

`RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime` runs a saved **TransformsV2** `PipelineDescriptor` on a **single frame** of an existing DataManager object and merges only the final result into an output key. Intermediate pipeline steps stay in memory (`executePipeline`); nothing is registered under per-step keys.

For the step-by-step implementation checklist, see [run_transforms_v2_pipeline_at_time_implementation.md](run_transforms_v2_pipeline_at_time_implementation.md).

## Parameters

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `input_key` | Source DataManager key |
| `output_key` | Destination key (updated at one frame) |
| `time` | Frame index; use `"${current_frame}"` in Triage JSON |
| `pipeline_id` | Library filename stem under `{config_dir}/pipelines/transforms_v2/` |
| `pipeline_path` | Optional JSON path (overrides `pipeline_id`) |
| `replace_existing_at_time` | Clear destination at `time` before merge (default `true`) |
| `create_output_if_missing` | Create output object if absent (default `false`) |

`CommandContext::config_dir` is required when using `pipeline_id`.

## Constraints

- Pipeline must not define `range_reduction` (output must remain a container).
- Supported types (v1): `LineData`, `MaskData`, `PointData` (merge); `AnalogTimeSeries`, `DigitalEventSeries` (extract only for merge in later work).
- Frame extraction for ragged types uses **lazy view storage** (`createFromView` + `getElementsInRange`), not `createTimeRangeCopy`.

## Example (Triage command sequence)

```json
{
  "command_name": "RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime",
  "parameters": {
    "input_key": "neurosam_masks",
    "output_key": "whisker_lines",
    "time": "${current_frame}",
    "pipeline_id": "mask_cleanup_to_line",
    "replace_existing_at_time": true
  }
}
```

## Source

- Command: `src/Commands/RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime.hpp`
- Bridge: `src/Commands/detail/FramePipelineBridge.hpp`
- Path resolution: `src/Commands/detail/PipelinePathResolver.hpp`
